description:
"YOU WILL DIE BY MY HANDS!"

Outcome Memories is SO peak.

I've been playing a lot lately, I don't play Forsaken for a while now because of this.

Only problems I got with the game is 2011X. Really... for me, it's just NOT fun being killer as 2011X and I don't like the way he is designed, mainly because of his passive. Rewarding getting cooked by good players and having a insta-win button is crazy.

I also didn't put any music on this one because the solo themes in Outcome Memories are designed for a specific character with their own themes and I just feel like you should have your own theme or something.

Anyways, Knuckles is the best character.

I hope you like It!

Please humiliate 2011X I fucking hate this guy COOK THAT BUM

Just a update to explain my absence. It's really simple.

I recovered a long time ago. I'm just not in the mood to make bots right now. When I tried making a bot these days, I just was so discouraged to do It I couldn't even write a starting message.

Maybe I just got a burnout. I don't know.

I'm going to take a break from making bots for a while. I don't know when I'll be back and I should have said this before, I'm sorry for that.

However, I think I'll update some of the bots I've already made.

I hope you all are okay and may all your days be wonderful, and If It isn't, I'm sure you'll be able to get through this.

See ya.
